prompt:
Ultra-realistic smartphone selfie portrait, genuinely photographed on a modern mobile phone. A stunning young East Asian woman fills the frame in an intimate close-up composition, with her face partially cropped so that only the upper two-thirds of her face is visible. Her deep brown eye is the focal point, reflecting soft ambient city lights. Smooth fair skin with natural texture, visible pores, and subtle imperfections for authenticity. Loose dark hair falls naturally across her cheek and temple, with a few strands catching the light.

She wears minimal everyday makeup: soft rosy blush, delicate taupe eyeshadow, lightly defined lashes, natural brows, and hydrated pink lips. Her expression is quiet and thoughtful, as if she has just paused while taking a spontaneous selfie. She gazes slightly past the camera rather than directly into it, creating a candid and cinematic feeling.

The scene is illuminated by cool evening window light combined with warm reflections from nearby streetlights, producing gentle color contrast and realistic shadow transitions across her face. Shot at arm’s length with a smartphone, authentic HDR processing, subtle handheld motion, shallow depth of field, realistic skin rendering, natural hair detail, slight lens softness near the frame edges, faint digital grain, casual everyday atmosphere, unedited iPhone-quality photo, photorealistic, hyper-detailed, no beauty filter, no studio setup, no text, no watermark, no logos, no AI-generated appearance.
promptEn:
Ultra-realistic smartphone selfie portrait, genuinely photographed on a modern mobile phone. A stunning young East Asian woman fills the frame in an intimate close-up composition, with her face partially cropped so that only the upper two-thirds of her face is visible. Her deep brown eye is the focal point, reflecting soft ambient city lights. Smooth fair skin with natural texture, visible pores, and subtle imperfections for authenticity. Loose dark hair falls naturally across her cheek and temple, with a few strands catching the light.

She wears minimal everyday makeup: soft rosy blush, delicate taupe eyeshadow, lightly defined lashes, natural brows, and hydrated pink lips. Her expression is quiet and thoughtful, as if she has just paused while taking a spontaneous selfie. She gazes slightly past the camera rather than directly into it, creating a candid and cinematic feeling.

The scene is illuminated by cool evening window light combined with warm reflections from nearby streetlights, producing gentle color contrast and realistic shadow transitions across her face. Shot at arm’s length with a smartphone, authentic HDR processing, subtle handheld motion, shallow depth of field, realistic skin rendering, natural hair detail, slight lens softness near the frame edges, faint digital grain, casual everyday atmosphere, unedited iPhone-quality photo, photorealistic, hyper-detailed, no beauty filter, no studio setup, no text, no watermark, no logos, no AI-generated appearance.
promptZh:
超写实智能手机自拍肖像，由现代手机真实拍摄。一位迷人的年轻 东亚女性 占据画面主体，采用亲密的特写构图，面部部分裁剪，仅露出面部的上三分之二。她深褐色的眼睛是视觉焦点，反射着柔和的城市环境光。光滑白皙的皮肤带有自然纹理、可见的毛孔和细微的瑕疵，以呈现真实感。蓬松的 深色头发 自然地垂落在她的脸颊和太阳穴旁，几缕发丝捕捉着光线。

她化着 极简日常妆容：柔和的玫瑰色腮红、精致的灰褐色眼影、轮廓分明的睫毛、自然的眉毛以及水润的粉色嘴唇。她的表情安静而深思，仿佛是在拍摄即兴自拍时刚刚停顿下来。她微微看向镜头之外，而非直视镜头，营造出一种坦率且具有电影感的氛围。

场景由凉爽的傍晚窗光与附近路灯的暖色反射光共同照亮，在她的脸上产生柔和的色彩对比和真实的阴影过渡。使用智能手机在手臂长度处拍摄，真实的 HDR 处理，轻微的手持晃动，浅景深，真实的皮肤渲染，自然的头发细节，画面边缘有轻微的镜头柔化，淡淡的数字噪点，休闲的日常氛围，未经编辑的 iPhone 级画质，照片级真实，超高细节，无美颜滤镜，无摄影棚布光，无文字，无水印，无 Logo，无 AI 生成感。
